title: Sarcinula areldii
taxonomy: Sarcinula areldii is a genus of fungi in the family Gomphaceae. The classification of Sarcinula areldii is within the phylum Ascomycota, which is a division of fungi characterized by the production of ascospores. This phylum is further divided into several classes, with Sarcinula areldii belonging to the class Leotiomycetes. The order of Sarcinula areldii is Gomphales, and it is commonly associated with the decomposition of organic matter. The exact classification of Sarcinula areldii may vary depending on the source and the ongoing research in mycology.
